summary: Remote debug log collector. POST: normalize (warning/error only) + sanitize + JSONL append. GET: query with token-gated access. Shares pure helpers with vite.config.test.ts (normalizeRemoteDebugPayload / sanitizeRemoteDebugText / filterRemoteDebugRecords).
envDeps: MIVO_DEBUG_VIEW_TOKEN (optional; if unset, GET is open)

normalizationRefs.note: Referenced, NOT re-implemented. P1-c BFF must preserve these exact behaviors; the existing vitest cases remain the canonical proof.

postScenarios.name: POST filters to warning/error only (log/info dropped)
postScenarios.note: Cap: entries.slice(0,40) (maxRemoteDebugEntries L254). Excess entries silently dropped.

postScenarios.name: POST sanitizes secrets/data-urls/long-base64
postScenarios.sourceRef: sanitizeRemoteDebugText L266-L275; vite.config.test.ts 'redacts likely secrets...' case

postScenarios.name: POST body exceeds 1MB → 413 intent, observable as ECONNRESET
postScenarios.sourceRef: readJsonRequest L477-L481 (request.destroy() at L468); catch L428 sendMivoJson 413
postScenarios.discrepancy: Same request.destroy() race as generate-413/edit-413: socket torn down before the 413 response is delivered. BFF must send clean 413.

postScenarios.name: POST origin restriction
postScenarios.expected: NONE — no origin/CORS/Referer check in current dev middleware
postScenarios.discrepancy: Plan §6.1 says 'POST: body limit/origin 限制' but current code has NO origin restriction. The 'origin 限制' is a P1-c intended addition (生产安全模型 §6.1: 'POST 限 origin/rate/body'), NOT current dev behavior. BFF must ADD origin gating; record as intended-change.

getScenarios.name: GET without token when MIVO_DEBUG_VIEW_TOKEN unset → 200 open
getScenarios.sourceRef: hasRemoteDebugViewAccess L408-L410 (returns true when no token configured)
getScenarios.discrepancy: Open-by-default GET is a production risk; plan §6.1 生产安全模型 requires GET to need a token in prod. Current dev = open. BFF must enforce token in prod. NOT live-captured: the capture run sets MIVO_DEBUG_VIEW_TOKEN to exercise the 403/token branches; the open branch is a trivial 2-line guard (L409-L410) verified by reading.

getScenarios.name: GET without token when MIVO_DEBUG_VIEW_TOKEN set → 403
GET default window = last 7 days, limit cap 1000 (default 200)
getScenarios.expected: dates = availableDates.slice(0,7); limit = min(Number(?limit)||200, 1000); records sorted by receivedAt desc
getScenarios.discrepancy: Plan §6.1 says 'limit cap 1000' but omits the default-200. Recorded for completeness.

getScenarios.name: GET filters: level / clientId / sessionId / q
GET records sorted by receivedAt desc
